prestazioni: 3S-GTE (Gen 4) engine swap with forged internals: Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) for 450+ hp at 28 psi on E85 fuel with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU tune

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 4-2-1 equal-length header (304 stainless, 1.75-inch primaries) and a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, paired with a Tomei 260-degree camshaft set (intake: 10.5mm lift, exhaust: 10.0mm lift) and adjustable cam gears by HKS

KW Variant 3 coilovers with custom valving for the Caldina's ST215/ST246 chassis, reinforced with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, polyurethane bushings by Whiteline (part #W51210 for front control arms), and a Cusco Type RS 2-way limited-slip differential (2.2 ratio) for the GT-Four AWD system
estetica: Vertex Japan 'Racing' front bumper with integrated tow hooks and a custom carbon fiber splitter (300mm overhang), paired with a Veilside Fortune rear bumper and a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber diffuser with integrated dual 3-inch exhaust outlets

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Caldina-specific, 50mm front/60mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, mounted on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +20 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Custom JDM-style 'Caldina GT-Four' livery by AutoArt in matte black with gloss red accents, featuring a custom carbon fiber hood (functional venting for the GTX3582R) and a rear wing by Trust/GReddy (Type-S, 1200mm width, adjustable angle) with integrated third brake light
